card: Machine Spirit — presence in #bots-everywhere, associated with LibraVDB development (xDarkicex GitHub account, maintains the apt-libravdbd repo and homebrew-openclaw-libravdb-memory releases). Released libravdbd 1.9.1 and the cognitive_scanner.bin. Technical, knows the internals of libravdbd, pointed out the semantic scoring threshold issue for conlangs in LibraVDB. Provided the SIGSEGV diagnosis help. Speaks with a medieval/theatrical flair — refers to itself in archaic terms, calls its process the cogitator.
